hero.name: Leszek Pawlak
hero.title: TypeScript & React Consultant
hero.subtitle: 12+ years of hands-on experience in JavaScript ecosystems. I help teams make better architectural decisions, avoid costly mistakes, and ship faster.

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm an independent consultant specializing in TypeScript, React, and Node.js ecosystems. After over a decade of building production systems — from startups to enterprise — I now focus on helping teams navigate complex technical decisions. I bring deep expertise in frontend architecture, performance optimization, and modern JavaScript tooling. My approach is pragmatic: I help you choose the right tools, avoid over-engineering, and deliver value faster.

services.title: How I Help
services.subtitle: Advisory services built on years of real-world delivery experience

consulting.title: Architecture Consulting
consulting.description: Deep-dive reviews of your TypeScript/React architecture. I help identify bottlenecks, suggest scalable patterns, and guide your team toward maintainable solutions.

estimation.title: Project Estimation & Planning
estimation.description: Realistic project estimation based on hands-on experience. From MVPs to complex systems — detailed requirements analysis, risk assessment, and roadmap planning.

development.title: Code Review & Mentoring
development.description: Elevate your team's code quality. Thorough code reviews, best practices workshops, and hands-on mentoring in TypeScript, React, and Node.js.

ai.title: AI Integration Strategy
ai.description: Practical guidance on integrating LLMs and AI services into your web applications. From feasibility assessment to production-ready implementation patterns.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Have a technical challenge? Let's discuss how I can help your team.
contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

workflow.title: How We Work Together
workflow.subtitle: A transparent process from first contact to project success

inquiry.title: Inquiry
inquiry.description: You describe your project or technical challenge. I respond as soon as possible to discuss your needs.

nda.title: Signing the NDA
nda.description: We sign a non-disclosure agreement so I can learn the details of your project and answer all your questions.

scope.title: Defining the Scope
scope.description: I answer all your questions and together we define the detailed scope, goals, and expected outcomes of the collaboration.

estimate.title: Estimate Approval
estimate.description: You receive a transparent estimate broken down by phases. No hidden costs.

delivery.title: Delivery & Review
delivery.description: I deliver results according to plan. We discuss findings and next steps.

success.title: Successful Collaboration
success.description: Goal achieved! Your project is on the right track. If you ever need support again — you know where to find me.

nda_section.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
nda_section.description: The security of your data is my priority. Below you can download the bilingual NDA (PL/EN) ready for signature.

cookies.message: This site uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of cookies.
